message: My father's orthopedic surgery is planned for this Friday at Fortis Hospital Mohali. We need to arrange 2 units of O+ blood by tomorrow evening as a standard backup. The patient is absolutely stable. Please contact me if you are available to donate in Chandigarh or Mohali.

Looking for 2 units of B+ blood for a scheduled hernia operation at Max Super Speciality Hospital, Vaishali. The surgery is fixed for Thursday morning. The patient is currently in stable condition. If anyone from Delhi NCR can volunteer, please ping me.

Need 3 units of A+ blood for a planned cardiac bypass surgery at Apollo Health City, Jubilee Hills, Hyderabad. The procedure is scheduled for Saturday morning. The patient is stable but needs replacement donors. Kindly message me if you can help.

A colleague's mother is undergoing a scheduled hysterectomy at Manipal Hospital, Old Airport Road, Bangalore this coming Wednesday. The family needs to arrange 2 units of AB+ blood beforehand. Patient is completely fine and stable. Please reach out if you can donate.

Requirement for 2 units of O- blood for a planned vascular surgery at KEM Hospital, Mumbai. The surgery is scheduled in 3 days. Patient is stable but due to the negative blood group, the hospital bank has requested a replacement. Please reply if you are available.

Arranging 2 units of A- blood for my grandmother's scheduled cataract and minor ENT surgery at Ruby Hall Clinic, Pune. The procedure is fixed for Friday morning. She is stable right now. Any A negative donor available in Pune, please reach out to me via DM.

We need to arrange 3 units of B+ blood for a routine chemotherapy transfusion at Tata Memorial Hospital, Mumbai. The scheduled date is Thursday. The patient is doing okay and stable. If you are near the Parel area and willing to donate, please let me know.

My uncle is admitted at Medanta The Medicity, Gurugram for a planned knee replacement surgery this coming Thursday. Doctors have asked for 2 units of O+ blood as standby. He is currently active and stable. Please let me know if anyone can visit the blood bank.

Requirement for 2 units of AB- blood for a planned bone marrow procedure at MGM Healthcare, Chennai. The treatment is scheduled for Friday. The patient is stable in the room. Since it's a rare group, looking for early leads. Please get in touch if you can help.

Need 2 units of A+ blood for a scheduled plastic reconstruction surgery at AMRI Hospitals, Salt Lake, Kolkata. The surgery will happen in four days. The patient is perfectly stable. Kindly drop a WhatsApp message if you can volunteer to donate at the hospital.

Looking for 1 unit of B- blood for a planned gallbladder removal at Zydus Hospital, Ahmedabad. The operation is fixed for Wednesday. Patient is stable. The hospital asked us to keep one replacement donor ready. Any leads in Ahmedabad will be highly appreciated.

My relative has a scheduled spinal decompression surgery at SMS Hospital, Jaipur this Friday. We need to arrange 2 units of O+ blood before that. He is currently stable and resting. If anyone can come down to the SMS blood bank to donate, please call me.

Arranging 2 units of B+ blood for a planned C-section delivery at Fernandez Hospital, Hyderabad on Thursday. Mother is absolutely stable, this is just a standard precautionary measure requested by the doctor. Please text me if you can visit the facility to donate.

Need 2 units of A+ blood for a scheduled monthly transfusion for a thalassemia patient at AIIMS Bhopal. The procedure is fixed for Saturday morning. The child is stable. If any regular or new donors are free in Bhopal, please do help out.

Planned kidney stone removal surgery scheduled for my brother at Paras Hospital, Patna this coming Wednesday. We require 2 units of O+ blood as a backup. He is totally stable right now. Please let me know if anyone is willing to donate at the hospital blood bank.

Requirement for 2 units of AB+ blood at PSG Hospitals, Peelamedu, Coimbatore. A scheduled orthopedic procedure is set for Friday. The patient is doing fine and is completely stable. If anyone can help with a donation, please contact me as soon as possible.

Looking for 2 units of A- blood for a planned prostate surgery at SGPGI, Lucknow. The surgery is scheduled in 3 days. The patient is currently stable in the ward. Since it is a negative group, we want to arrange it well in advance. Please DM if available.

My aunt has a planned thyroidectomy scheduled for Thursday morning at Aster Medcity, Kochi. The medical team has asked us to arrange 1 unit of B+ blood as a standard safety protocol. She is stable. Please get in touch if you are available to donate.

Need 3 units of O+ blood for a planned gastric bypass surgery at Apollo Hospitals, Greams Road, Chennai. The operation is fixed for Saturday. The patient is stable and keeping well. If any voluntary donors can assist, please drop a message here.

Requirement for 2 units of A+ blood at Narayana Hethralaya, Bangalore for a scheduled advanced eye surgery coming up this Friday. The patient is stable but elderly. We need replacement donors to update the bank records. Kindly connect if you can help.

Hi, my cousin's scheduled double hernia operation is fixed for Wednesday at Artemis Hospital, Gurgaon. We need to manage 2 units of B+ blood for the procedure. The patient is completely stable. Please contact me if you are willing to visit the blood bank.

For a planned maxillo-facial surgery at Hinduja Hospital, Mumbai, we need to arrange 2 units of O- blood by Friday. The patient is stable and fine. If any O negative donors in Mumbai can volunteer to exchange or donate, please reach out directly via DM.

Looking for 2 units of AB+ blood for a planned skin grafting procedure at Jehangir Hospital, Pune. The surgery is fixed for Thursday afternoon. The patient is currently resting and stable. Please let me know if you can volunteer to donate blood.

Need 2 units of A+ blood for a scheduled tumor excision at Belle Vue Clinic, Kolkata. The operation is planned for Saturday morning. The patient is in stable condition. If anyone is interested in donating blood this week in Kolkata, please call me.

Arranging 2 units of B- blood for a planned joint replacement surgery at Yashoda Hospital, Secunderabad, Hyderabad. The procedure is scheduled for Thursday. Patient is fully stable. Any negative group donor who can help out, please contact me as soon as possible.

Rotary Club Delhi is hosting a Voluntary Blood Donation Camp this Saturday at the Community Center, Saket. Timings are 9:30 AM to 4:30 PM. All healthy individuals are requested to participate. Every single donation helps save multiple lives. Do attend!

A big thank you to the voluntary donor who visited Manipal Hospital Bangalore yesterday to give B+ blood for my grandfather's procedure. The surgery went smoothly, and he is recovering well now. Your timely gesture saved us a lot of stress!

Quick question for the group: Can a person donate blood if they recovered from a standard viral fever and finished antibiotics 2 weeks ago? Looking to join a corporate donation drive in Mumbai this Friday. Please share if you know the exact rules.

Lions Club Chennai is organizing an emergency blood donor enrollment drive at Anna Nagar public library this Sunday from 10 AM onwards. Registering your blood group helps local networks track down donors quickly during massive shortages. Please sign up.

Did you know that donating blood regularly reduces excess iron accumulation in the body and helps maintain good cardiovascular health? It's a healthy habit that also acts as a lifeline for others. Visit the nearest certified blood bank in Kolkata today.

Official Update: The Blood Bank at Nizam's Institute of Medical Sciences (NIMS), Hyderabad has updated its stock levels. They have a massive shortage of A- and O- negative units right now. Voluntary negative group donors are requested to visit this week.
hospital: Nizam's Institute of Medical Sciences, Hyderabad

message: Proud to share that our college student council at Pune University successfully gathered 120 units of blood in collaboration with the Red Cross Society yesterday. A massive shoutout to all the brave student donors who took out time to support this cause!

Is there a specific weight limit or hemoglobin requirement for women to donate blood in India? My sister wants to participate in an upcoming donation drive in Jaipur next Tuesday but wanted to check the medical criteria first. Any guidance?

SGPGI Lucknow is organizing a public health awareness seminar coupled with a blood donation desk on World Blood Donor Day. Venue: Administrative Block Ground, SGPGI. Time: 10:00 AM to 3:00 PM. Complimentary health checks provided for all.

Deeply thankful to the two gentlemen who reached out via Twitter and donated A+ blood at Civil Hospital Ahmedabad for my mother's planned surgery yesterday. Your altruism ensured everything went safely. Truly appreciate your incredible support!

Massive Blood Donation Drive scheduled this Friday at Infopark Campus, Kakkanad, Kochi. Managed by the local IMA Blood Bank team. Requesting all IT professionals and corporate employees to spare 15 minutes and save lives. Location: Phase 1 Auditorium.

Can anyone provide the latest operational hours and contact numbers for the government blood bank located at GMCH Sector 32, Chandigarh? Need to call them regarding standard exchange formalities for a future procedure. Thanks in advance.

The Youth Welfare Association of Bhopal is building a verified database of emergency voluntary blood donors across the city. If you are residing in Bhopal and want to contribute as an active donor, please register on our website link below.

Important Advisory: Always make sure you have a proper meal and stay fully hydrated before going to donate blood. Avoid fasting or skipping breakfast on the day of donation to prevent dizziness. Be safe while doing a great deed!

A specialized blood donation camp is being set up at the PSG Tech Campus, Coimbatore this coming Wednesday. Organized by the Government Hospital team. All students, alumni, and local residents are warmly invited to join and participate.

Extremely grateful to the young ladies from Delhi University who stepped forward and donated B- blood at Max Hospital Saket last evening. Your immediate response to our message saved our family from an extreme crisis. Thank you so much!

Does anyone know the medical cooling-off period required for blood donation after getting a standard international travel vaccine? Planning to attend a neighborhood community camp in Mumbai next week. Please clarify if anyone knows.

Blood Donation Camp Alert! Rotary Bangalore is hosting a mobile collection unit right outside the MG Road Metro Station tomorrow from 10 AM to 5:30 PM. If you are commuting through this route, please take out a few minutes to save a life today.

Friendly reminder that a single unit of blood can be separated into red cells, plasma, and platelets, potentially saving three separate individuals. Think about the impact you make. Step forward and donate at any authorized center in Chennai.

Our social group is actively refreshing the database for rare and negative blood group individuals (O-, AB-, A-, B-) across the Kolkata district. If you are willing to receive alerts during extreme shortages, please message us your contact details.

Kudos to the entire medical staff working at Gandhi Hospital Blood Bank, Hyderabad. Stopped by today for a voluntary donation and was deeply impressed by the hygiene standards, speed, and courteous behavior. Highly recommend everyone to visit.

To mark our community anniversary, a mega public blood camp is planned at the Sahakari Complex Ground, Pune this Saturday. Monitored strictly by Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital doctors. E-certificates will be issued to all voluntary donors.

Are individuals on regular oral medication for basic seasonal allergies eligible to donate blood? There is a donation camp taking place at our corporate complex in Jaipur this Thursday and I want to be 100% sure before I register. Thanks!

Heartfelt thanks to the corporate group members who widely shared our message for AB+ blood last week. The scheduled operation at Medanta Lucknow went successfully and the patient has returned home safe. Your digital help saved us.

Public Alert: The Red Cross Blood Bank in Ahmedabad has registered a substantial dip in all common blood group inventories due to extreme weather limiting walk-in crowds. If you are healthy, please visit the Ashram Road facility to donate today.
